speaker: MATT
raw_text: Make a wisdom saving throw. Actually, no, for this I'm going to have to ask you guys both to roll initiative. That's what this is going to come down to.

preceding_turns.speaker: JON
preceding_turns.text: Okay.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Wait for me there.

preceding_turns.speaker: JON
preceding_turns.text: They were nice people anyway. All right.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: So, Vex, you're now there, staring at the Danny Trejo-like visage of the Meat Man.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: I'll grab her by the hand and pull her into... Is there a back alley or a side place or a shadow anywhere?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: There's, maybe about 15 feet off, a little alley you could duck into, yeah.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Come with me.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Of course.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: When we're safely off the street, I take off the Hat of Disguise and reveal myself.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Scanlan!

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Hi.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: What are you doing? I mean, I knew it was you, but I thought you were going to reveal yourself to everyone.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: What you do notice about Scanlan... Definitely tanner skin; that scar you saw under the eye, still there on Scanlan, and the clothing and the outfit design is much more Marquesian than you recall. Definitely more Gilmore than Scanlan.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Have you been there the whole time?

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Not the whole time, but for much of it. I didn't know if I could talk to you all.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: I hold his hand and just listen.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: There's a lot to talk about, but not here. I have appearances to keep up, I have people depending on me who work for me.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Are you really the Meat Man there?

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: I am many things.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Darling.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Well, I am.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Okay.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Yes, I am, but it's not what you would think. I'm not a bad guy. This is not the place to talk about this. Listen to me. Vex, there will be a time to discuss this, but right now, I'm casting Modify Memory on you.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Don't you do it.

preceding_turns.speaker: SAM
preceding_turns.text: Yes.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Don't you do it! I push him against the wall. Can I break it? Can I break it before he does it?

speaker: MATT
raw_text: So then, I want you guys both to roll initiative.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: So what's your armor class?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: 18. Go ahead and roll, for this here, I'd say a d4. Why not? Because you guys are pretty beefy. A d4 and add your strength modifier.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Nine. Ten, sorry.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: He comes across and cold-cocks you in the chin. You take ten points of damage from a single punch. You feel a looseness to one of your back teeth, and the white hits you, and your vision clears for a second, and you look over and you see the beefy, gray-skinned goliath, his fist still extended as he pulls it back, staring right at you.

preceding_turns.speaker: JON
preceding_turns.text: Whoa, that hurt!

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Yeah. This bar, there's a lot more where that came from. All you can eat, yeah.

preceding_turns.speaker: JON
preceding_turns.text: Show me! That was awesome!

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Rage.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Oh no! Oh no.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Total rage.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: We're not here.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: Yes, we are.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: I thought you and I-- I asked...

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: I thought we all said we went.

preceding_turns.speaker: LIAM
preceding_turns.text: They all left, we were behind. This is the problem when everybody's thoughts are in different heads.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Do you guys want to be in the same bar or not, that's my question right now.

preceding_turns.speaker: LAURA
preceding_turns.text: We don't have to be. Okay, then no. We're not there, then.

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: Okay, so you're not there. This is happening between you guys. Grog goes into a rage.

preceding_turns.speaker: TRAVIS
preceding_turns.text: Are we at a bar? At a table?

preceding_turns.speaker: MATT
preceding_turns.text: You guys are in a tavern. There's a few people, and as soon as that punch happened, a few people were like, "Ooh!" in the background, and as soon as you stand up and go into a rage, people begin to back out of the way. Tables are being pushed to the side.

preceding_turns.speaker: TALIESIN
preceding_turns.text: I'm pulling gold out to pay for this.

preceding_turns.speaker: JON
preceding_turns.text: I think it's awesome. I'm like, I want to fight back. But not-- it's play for me, now.
